/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,liblog_l3_c_api.so -o liblog_l3_c_api.so CMakeFiles/log_l3_c_api.dir/src/log_l3_c_api.cpp.o  liblog_l3.a ../log_service/liblog_service.a ../log_writer/liblog_writer.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.5.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../log_agent/liblog_agent.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lpthread
